description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image with a cache on the vendor directory. Define a test stage job named test that runs on all branches except master, executing apt-get update -yqqq, apt-get install -y nodejs, bundle install --path vendor, and bundle exec middleman build. Define a deploy stage job named pages that runs only on the master branch, runs the same four commands, and publishes the generated public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Ensure the pages job uses the built‑in pages deployment target. No additional services are required.
